ddls:
CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_no" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with this invoice */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was issued */,
  "invoice_time" TEXT /* Time the invoice was issued */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of items in the invoice */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the invoice was issued */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the invoice was issued */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the invoice was issued */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used for payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "invoice_status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., pending, paid, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program the customer is part of */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* Segment the customer belongs to (e.g., premium, regular) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_customer_segment FOREIGN KEY ("customer_segment") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_items" (
  "invoice_no" TEXT /* Invoice number associated with the item */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Product stock code */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price per unit for this item */,
  "total_item_price" REAL /* Total price for this item (Quantity * Unit Price) */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_no", "stock_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales report */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the report */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the report */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the month */,
  "total_customers" INTEGER /* Total number of unique customers for the month */,
  "average_order_value" REAL /* Average value of orders for the month */,
  "top_selling_products" TEXT /* List of top-selling products for the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES invoices ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_month FOREIGN KEY ("month") REFERENCES invoices ("month")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Sales Staff) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID representing the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, view report) */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., specific report, page) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment */,
  "segment_description" TEXT /* Description of the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "rewards_policy" TEXT /* Policy for rewarding points or discounts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., email, phone call, chat) */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Details of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product review */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("stock_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_carriers" (
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping carrier */,
  "carrier_name" TEXT /* Name of the carrier */,
  "carrier_description" TEXT /* Description of the carrier */,
  "shipping_rates" TEXT /* Shipping rates offered by the carrier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carrier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Order ID associated with the item */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* Product ID of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id", "product_id")
)
